children.text: Antitrust evidence that is received by the Attorney General or the Commission under . Nothing in this paragraph shall affect the ability of the Attorney General or the Commission to disclose to a foreign antitrust authority antitrust evidence that is obtained otherwise than under .section 18a of this titlesection 18a of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a foreign antitrust authority with respect to which a particularized need for such antitrust evidence is shown shall be considered to be an appropriate official of any of the several States, and

children.label: B
children.text: a foreign antitrust law administered or enforced by the foreign antitrust authority shall be considered to be a State criminal law.

children.label: A
children.text: that is classified pursuant to such order or such successor, or

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to which a determination of classification is pending under such order or such successor.
Antitrust evidence that is classified under .section 2162 of title 42
